name: refactor
description: Standard refactor workflow: analyze → refactor → verify no regressions

tasks.content: Analyze current code — identify what needs refactoring and why
tasks.criteria: Specific code smells/issues identified. Refactoring scope defined.

tasks.content: Write characterization tests — capture current behavior before changing
tasks.criteria: Existing behavior captured in tests. Tests pass before refactor.
Code improved. No functional changes to external behavior.

tasks.content: Verify — run all tests, confirm no regressions
tasks.criteria: All characterization tests pass. All existing tests pass. No behavioral regressions.
